text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has asked me to assist her with her
dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Could you cheer for me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I'm still not used to dancing in front of
crowds.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay during races because I'm so focused on
running, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Concerts are a different story. That's why I want
you to cheer me on as loud as you can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I do as she asks, cheering her on as she dances.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much for coming today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I hope that you enjoy the concert just as much as
the race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: W-with that said...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just can't concentrate. What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just can't concentrate. What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're right... There will be even more people at
a real performance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for stopping so suddenly. Let's try again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Errr... Where was I? Oh, right... So, please enjoy
the first song—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Over where?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a bit of struggle, Silence Suzuka manages to
complete her performance even with my cheers
ringing in her ears. I think she's ready for the real
thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest she try responding to the crowd in
moments when she can't keep focus.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see. I'll try it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. That's me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I hope you all enjoy the concert.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew... How was that?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka manages to complete both her
song and dance. I can't wait for her next winning
concert.
